nasb.text: Immediately Jesus, aware in His spirit that they were reasoning that way within themselves, *said to them, “Why are you reasoning about these things in your hearts?

esv.text: And immediately Jesus, perceiving in his spirit that they thus questioned within themselves, said to them, “Why do you question these things in your hearts?

cnv.text: 耶穌心裡立刻知道他們這樣議論，就對他們說：“你們心裡為甚麼議論這事？

ccb.text: 耶稣立刻看透了他们的心思，就说：“你们为什么这样心里议论呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣灵里立刻知道他们心里这样想，就对他们说：“你们心里为什么想这些事呢？
